channel.title: Gnarly Void - weaving
channel.description: Tufted fiber art, weaving, pottery, and handmade objects by Jake Goldsborough in the Pacific Northwest.

item.title: Vulfmon-inspired Black, Silver, Gold, and White Wall Weaving
item.author: site@gnarlyvoid.com (Jake Goldsborough)
item.description:
Inspired by a piece seen in a Vulfmon video
